violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item * was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. - To go boxes are dirty.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Walls and floors require more thorough cleaning.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Cold hold prep table on the west wall was leaking water and unable to maintain temperature. Briskets and ribs were 57*F. and the tomatoes and Jalapenos on the prep top were 46*F

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. - Mash Potatoes should be stirred every hour or so. Temp was 127*F. other more liquid items on the hot hold were at an acceptable range.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment * that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Ice chute on the soda fountain dirty.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. - West and South doors have an air gap at the bottom allowing for insects and/pest.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
